name: agentic-security
description: Agentic-Security scanner + MCP server for Gemini CLI. Provides 12 MCP tools the Gemini agent can call directly: scan, query taint, explain finding, find rule module, look up CVE, synthesize / verify / apply fix, append / read scratchpad, append / read AGENTS.md memory.

agentic-security.description: agentic-security MCP server. Session root confined to the current project directory; apply_fix requires confirm:true and a valid last-scan.json HMAC signature; shadow findings are never auto-applied.

notes: Gemini CLI support via MCP. The slash commands (/scan, /fix, /secure, /explain) and auto-activating skills are Claude-Code-specific today; Gemini users get the 12 MCP tools and can wire them into Gemini-native workflows.
